option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: db: image: postgres:15-alpine container_name: seta_postgres_db environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password POSTGRES_DB: seta_miniproject_db ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data restart: unless-stopped
volumes: postgres_data:

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
